2603.10677.title: Emulating Clinician Cognition via Self-Evolving Deep Clinical Research
2603.10677.paper_summary: Clinical diagnosis is a complex cognitive process, grounded in dynamic cue acquisition and continuous expertise accumulation. Yet most current artificial intelligence (AI) systems are misaligned with this reality, treating diagnosis as single-pass retrospective prediction while lacking auditable mechanisms for governed improvement. We developed DxEvolve, a self-evolving diagnostic agent that bridges these gaps through an interactive deep clinical research workflow. The framework autonomously requisitions examinations and continually externalizes clinical experience from increasing encounter exposure as diagnostic cognition primitives. On the MIMIC-CDM benchmark, DxEvolve improved diagnostic accuracy by 11.2% on average over backbone models and reached 90.4% on a reader-study subset, comparable to the clinician reference (88.8%). DxEvolve improved accuracy on an independent external cohort by 10.2% (categories covered by the source cohort) and 17.1% (uncovered categories) compared to the competitive method. By transforming experience into a governable learning asset, DxEvolve supports an accountable pathway for the continual evolution of clinical AI.
2603.10677.paper_summary_zh: 臨床診斷是一個複雜的認知過程，基於動態的線索獲取和持續的專業知識積累。<lb/>然而，目前大多數人工智慧（AI）系統與這一現實不符，將診斷視為單次回顧性預測，並缺乏可審計的改進機制。<lb/>我們開發了DxEvolve，一個自我演進的診斷代理，通過互動式深度臨床研究工作流程來彌補這些差距。<lb/>該框架自主要求檢查，並持續從不斷增加的接觸曝光中外化臨床經驗，作為診斷認知的基本要素。<lb/>在MIMIC-CDM基準上，DxEvolve在基礎模型上平均提高了11.2%的診斷準確率，並在讀者研究子集上達到了90.4%，與臨床醫生參考的88.8%相當。<lb/>與競爭方法相比，DxEvolve在一個獨立的外部隊列上提高了10.2%的準確率（源隊列涵蓋的類別）和17.1%（未涵蓋類別）。<lb/>通過將經驗轉化為可管理的學習資產，DxEvolve支持臨床AI持續演進的負責任途徑。
2603.10677.author: Ruiyang Ren et.al.
2603.10677.authors: Ruiyang Ren, Yuhao Wang, Yunsen Liang, Lan Luo, Jing Liu, Haifeng Wang, Cong Feng, Yinan Zhang, Chunyan Miao, Ji-Rong Wen, Wayne Xin Zhao
